scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace backend & npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.verify:standard: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test:e2e --workspace backend -- API_tests/transactions-authz.e2e-spec.ts API_tests/auth-session.e2e-spec.ts API_tests/auth-cookie-security.e2e-spec.ts API_tests/payment-channels-security.e2e-spec.ts API_tests/db-integration-security.e2e-spec.ts && npm run test --workspace frontend && npm run test:e2e --workspace frontend
